rows.purpose: CMS runtime, CLI, observation, metrics, drift, evidence, validation, memory, planning, correction, schemas, artifacts, and utilities.
Metric contract declarations for repository-bound measurement surfaces.
Future seed/configuration inputs for CMS scenarios and runtime examples.
Repository context indexes and RCC-N meaning/navigation maps.
Software architecture contracts and architecture validation surfaces.
Process protocols, operating rules, and governance procedures.
Theory and conceptual boundary documents.
Versioned CMS documents for each evolution layer.
Injection records showing what changed, why, and where.
Release seals for checkpointed repository states.
Current and future CMS development anchors.
Directory-box manifests, directory-lock reports, and public navigation rules.
RCC-N route maps, task routing, agent handoff, and local orientation surfaces.
README audit scanner, RCC-N checker, and navigation validation utilities.
Architecture, runtime, directory, and release validation scripts.
Latest observation state emitted by the CMS runtime.
Latest metric evaluation artifacts.
Latest CMS drift reports and K/D coherence measures.
Latest evidence packages emitted by the runtime.
Append-only lineage ledger entries for version continuity.
Append-only injection ledger entries for repository evolution.
Machine-readable version registry and next-anchor record.
Machine-readable full directory box and validation reports.
Human-readable and JSON runtime observation reports.
Human-readable and JSON metric-contract reports.
Human-readable and JSON drift reports.
Human-readable and JSON evidence package reports.
README and mini README audit reports.
RCC-N navigation check reports.
Architecture validation reports.
Directory box and durable surface validation reports.
Release readiness reports and checkpoint validation outputs.
Unit tests for runtime observation, metrics, drift, and evidence cycle.
Future examples and walkthrough surfaces.

rule: Any folder add/remove/rename/repurpose must update README Full Directory Box, affected mini README, context indexes, route map, and validation reports in the same commit.
non_claim_lock: Directory navigation is not code correctness.
